prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SMEEBO-83X51-ORNG Product Type: BLANKET Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Survival Mylar Extreme Emergency Blanket Orange Description: This Mylar Emergency Survival Blanket is ideal for extreme cold survival situations because the Mylar foil reflects 90 percent of your body heat back to you.

Mylar foil assists the body in heat retention during emergency situations. Emergency blankets are individually bagged. Perfect for emergency protection in all weather conditions. Waterproof and windproof. Will not crack or shrink. It is reusable and can also be used as Shelter, Ground Cover, etc...

Great for Camping, Hiking, Emergency Kits and Outdoor Activities. Search Terms: hiking gear backpacking accesories camping supplies emergency survival kit Features: - Expanded Dimensions: 83" x 51" - Heavy Duty Mylar Material - Aluminized PE - Tear Resistant - Flame, Wind, & Water Retardant === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 83x51 Orange Survival Mylar Emergency Blanket

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Orange Mylar Emergency Survival Blanket

anthropic.title_differentiation: Reflects 90 Percent Body Heat, Waterproof And Windproof, Tear Resistant, Reusable, Extreme Cold Protection

openai.title_differentiation: 83" X 51", Heavy Duty Aluminized PE, Tear Resistant, Windproof, Waterproof, Reusable, Flame Retardant
